sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Perspective Shift Stages
special_mechanics.description: Stages 2, 4, and 6 transition from horizontal side-scrolling to vertical downward-scrolling perspective, changing gameplay dynamics

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Speed boosters, increased firepower, homing missiles, and shields (Options). All upgrades lost on death.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Progression
special_mechanics.description: Player starts with single shot, can upgrade to 3-way gun, spread fire, laser, and hoop-like weapon

special_mechanics.name: Final Stage Escape Sequence
special_mechanics.description: Stage 7 involves escape from alien's rectal cavity before implosion, increasing pressure/difficulty

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Game is a horizontal scrolling shmup with stage perspective shifts. No precise movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics are documented. Gameplay focuses on shooting mechanics, enemy patterns, and power-up management rather than character movement physics. Sources contain design documentation and regional differences but no technical physics parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Abadox: The Deadly Inner War
Wikipedia - Abadox: The Deadly Inner War
